objective: Build Alpha processing and query workflows that normalize ISP Incident Report, Zabbix, and ITcenter sources, connect them into an operational timeline, and let SuperAgent answer exact site/time-range questions from deterministic tool results.
next_actions: Build and validate the Clean Rawdata - Zabbix workflow on Alpha using uploaded impact-focused Zabbix CSV/XLSX exports
Validate CPL May 2026 Zabbix pattern-family counts through the query workflow/tool
Build the Clean Rawdata - ITcenter workflow after Zabbix processing is stable
constraints: Do not describe raw Zabbix alerts as confirmed incidents
Use ISP Incident Report as the source of truth for confirmed incident existence, RCA, resolution status, and responsibility domain
Use ITcenter tickets as direct user-impact evidence when available
Use Zabbix as monitoring context unless correlation is explicitly supported by timing, site, and signal relevance
For exact site/time-range answers, use the query workflow/tool instead of counting Knowledge fragments
Do not upload JSON files to Alpha Knowledge; upload validated Markdown only
Do not refresh Alpha Knowledge unless validation_status=PASS and upload_allowed=true
